description: Multiple tool calls in one response — does the model emit multiple tool_calls?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. You can run commands and read files. When asked to do multiple things, use multiple tool calls in a single response.
Read the file main.py and also run 'ls -la' to see the directory listing.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.
